query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentSource = 'web_search' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as web_search_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN roleRelevance = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_relevance,
  SUM(CASE WHEN roleRelevance = 'medium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium_relevance,
  COUNT(DISTINCT project) as projects_with_contacts
FROM contacts;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentSource = 'web_search' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as web_search_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN roleRelevance = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_relevance,
  SUM(CASE WHEN roleRelevance = 'medium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium_relevance,
  COUNT(DISTINCT project) as projects_with_contacts
FROM contacts;
